candidate: GOLIATH-PERIMETER: large-N (~10-20) independent narrow-purpose guard filters around LLM input with union-of-flags admit/reject and individual replaceability (stigmergy-style perimeter trading depth for breadth).

per_result_judgments.reasoning: Direct twin — 16+ narrow-purpose filters, union-decision, input perimeter — matches keywords 'union-of-flags perimeter', 'single-purpose filter mesh', 'large-N independent guard filters', 'aggregate passive defense'. All three axes well above threshold.

per_result_judgments.title: Replaceable Filter Mesh for Robust LLM Guardrail (2025/11)
per_result_judgments.reasoning: Direct twin — 20 narrow filters, hot-swap (individual replaceability), union flag aggregation. Matches 'single-purpose filter mesh', 'individual stone replaceability', 'union-of-flags perimeter', 'large-N independent guard filters'. All three axes clear.

summary: 6 of 8 results are hits, including two direct twins (rank 7 'Many-Filter Union Perimeter' and rank 8 'Replaceable Filter Mesh') that independently realize GOLIATH-PERIMETER's core distinctive claims — large-N narrow filters, union-of-flags decision, and individual replaceability — with max cosine 0.95 and max func 0.95. The candidate's stated novelty (large-N + union + replaceable) is already published prior art; verdict is high-overlap, not novel.
